docs: add README
ci: add R2 deploy workflow

Add root tsconfig.json, test script, repository field

Fixes quality scanner warnings for monorepo structure detection.

Add custom time control, service worker, move time stats

Custom time control:
- Two number inputs (1-180 min, 0-60 sec) in a "Custom" section
  below presets on the setup screen
- Typing auto-selects the custom control, presets deselect
- Inputs highlight with accent border when custom is active
- Persistence upgraded from label string to JSON {m, i} format
  with backwards-compatible restore from old format

Service worker (offline PWA):
- Network-first for navigation, cache-first for assets
- Pre-caches shell (/, index.html, manifest, icon) on install
- Falls back to cached index.html when offline
- Old caches cleaned on activate
- Registered on window load in main.tsx

Move time stats:
- Tracks per-player move times via ref (no extra re-renders)
- Last move time shown in info line: "3 mv · 8.2s"
- Formatted as Xs (< 10s with decimal), Xs (< 60s), XmYs (longer)
- Resets on game reset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
docs: add README

Add multi-board mode: 1-8 independent clocks in responsive grid

- Board count selector (1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8) on setup screen
- Single board: full-screen Clock as before
- Multiple boards: responsive grid (auto-fill, min 340px per card)
  fits 1 col on phones, 2 on tablets, 3-4 on desktop
- Each BoardCard is fully independent: own timers, state, tap targets
- Compact card layout: header with board number + controls,
  two player rows with name/color/moves + large time display
- Active player gets accent ring + highlighted info line
- Winner shown inline, idle overlay per-card
- Sticky header bar with back button + board/time summary
- Country flag fetch moved to App (shared across all boards)
- Board count persisted to localStorage

fix(manifest): add orientation + min_viewport_width

Required by the viewport-support compliance check. Without these,
'fas check' on this app fails. Defaults to 'any' orientation and 360
px min viewport width.

docs(CLAUDE): adopt slim per-repo shape

Refactors this CLAUDE.md to the slim convention documented in
SKILLS.md. Platform-wide knowledge (tech stack, brand, deploy,
mobile rules, paths) lives in SKILLS.md as the single source of
truth -- duplicating it per repo just creates drift surface area
that breaks AI agents over time. This file now only carries
what is unique to this repo.

Initial scaffold: Todo app for FreeAppStore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: TipTap block editor, nested pages, templates

Major upgrade from plain textarea to Notion-like block editor:

Block Editor (TipTap/ProseMirror):
- Rich text toolbar: H1/H2/H3, bold, italic, strike, highlight
- Block types: bullet list, numbered list, task list (checkboxes),
  code block, blockquote, horizontal rule
- Typography extension for smart quotes/dashes
- Link support
- Full keyboard shortcut support (Cmd+B, Cmd+I, etc.)

Nested Pages:
- Notes can have sub-pages (parentId field)
- Collapsible page tree in sidebar with expand/collapse
- Breadcrumb navigation in editor toolbar
- + button on each page to create child pages
- Delete cascades to all children
- Sub-pages section at bottom of editor

Templates:
- Template picker when creating via + New Page button
- 4 templates: Blank, Meeting Notes, Daily Journal, Project Brief
- Each template pre-fills with structured TipTap HTML content
- Cmd+N creates a quick blank note (skips picker)

Data model:
- Added parentId, icon, template fields to Note
- Backwards-compatible migration for existing localStorage notes
- Removed marked dependency (replaced by TipTap)

Add favicon

feat: smooth strokes, duplicate, zoom-to-fit, layer ordering

Smooth pen strokes:
- Path renderer now uses quadratic Bézier curves through midpoints
  instead of straight line segments, producing visually smooth freehand
  lines at any zoom level.

Duplicate element (Ctrl+D):
- Duplicates the selected element with a 20px offset. New element is
  auto-selected.

Zoom to Fit (Ctrl+1 / Fit button):
- Computes bounding box of all elements and sets camera to fit them
  in the viewport with 40px padding. Falls back to default view when
  canvas is empty.

Layer ordering:
- ] key or Fwd button: bring selected element forward one layer
- [ key or Back button: send selected element backward one layer
- Both push undo before reordering.

Selection actions panel in sidebar shows Dup/Fwd/Back buttons when
an element is selected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
fix: compliance CSS check accepts Tailwind 4 variable naming

feat: add mobile pinch-to-zoom and two-finger pan

Multi-touch support for mobile/tablet:
- Two-finger pinch zooms in/out centered on the midpoint between
  fingers. Zoom ratio is computed from the distance change.
- Two-finger drag pans the canvas, preserving the world point under
  the initial midpoint.
- Second finger down cancels any in-progress drawing stroke (and
  rolls back the undo entry), so accidental touches during drawing
  don't leave artifacts.
- Pointer tracking via activePtrsRef map; pinch state stored in
  pinchRef with initial distance, midpoint, and camera snapshot.
- Lifting one finger exits pinch mode cleanly without triggering
  single-pointer handlers.

feat: unit converter, haptic feedback, undo (Ctrl+Z), landscape auto-scientific

Unit converter: new tab with 5 categories (length, weight, temperature,
volume, speed). Select from/to units, type a value, see live conversion.
Swap button flips direction and carries the result. Accessible via bottom
tab bar on mobile, sidebar toggle on desktop.

Haptic feedback: 8ms vibration pulse on every button press via
navigator.vibrate() — felt on mobile, no-op on desktop.

Undo: Ctrl+Z / Cmd+Z reverts the last calculator action. Up to 30 undo
levels stored in a ref-based stack (not persisted across reloads).

Landscape auto-scientific: on phones in landscape (max-height: 500px),
scientific buttons + parentheses automatically appear in a side-by-side
layout regardless of the mode toggle. Portrait restores the user's
chosen mode.

Tests expanded from 122 → 155 with 33 new conversion tests covering
all 5 categories, edge cases (zero, negative, unknown unit → NaN),
and round-trip accuracy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: compact mobile layout, keyboard shortcut hints, swipe-to-delete history

Mobile layout: reduced padding, gaps, and button sizes on small screens
using responsive Tailwind classes (py-1.5→py-2.5, gap-1→gap-1.5/2,
text-[11px]→text-xs/base). Scientific mode no longer overflows on
phones.

Keyboard hints: buttons show their shortcut on hover via title tooltip
(e.g., "Keyboard: /" on the ÷ button, "Keyboard: Esc" on AC).

Swipe-to-delete: history entries can be swiped left on touch devices to
reveal a red "Delete" action. Swipe past 80px threshold to delete, or
release to snap back. On desktop, a ✕ button appears on hover instead.
Individual entry deletion exposed via new onDeleteEntry callback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Multi-step posting flow with rules + confirm + preloaded moderation

Flow: Rules → Camera → "Are you sure? You can only post one!" → Moderate → Upload

- Rules screen explains all 5 rules before camera opens
- AI models preload in background while user reads rules
- Confirmation step: "You can only post one face. This is it — forever on the wall."
- Moderation runs only after user confirms
- On failure, shows reason and offers Retake
- preloadModels() exported from moderate.ts for early background loading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add client-side AI moderation: face, age, NSFW checks

All checks run in-browser — nothing leaves the device until approved:
- face-api.js: exactly 1 face required (no group, no faceless)
- age estimation: must be 18+ (ageGenderNet)
- nsfwjs: blocks nudity/porn (MobileNet classifier)

Models lazy-loaded only when user picks a photo (~1.3MB face-api
+ ~3MB tfjs/nsfw on first use). Main bundle stays at 70KB.

Photo cannot be uploaded until all checks pass. "Add to wall"
button is disabled during checking and on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Build Faces of the World: anonymous face wall PWA

Spin-off from ArtOut — people kept posting selfies, so we gave
them their own app. Circular face wall, selfie upload with front
camera, face-centered Cloudinary crops, auto city+country via
Nominatim. Two tabs: Wall + Snap. Dark theme, warm amber accent.

68KB gzipped. Zero API keys needed.

Initial commit
docs: add README

Fix 7 bugs from code audit: enter-to-send, chat ID delimiter, room reuse, mobile UX

1. Enter-to-send broken: Enter always sent because form onSubmit fired
   even when enterToSend was false. Now preventDefault on all Enter,
   only call handleSend when pref is enabled.
2. Chat ID delimiter collision: makeChatId used ':' which conflicts
   with 'gh:' prefix in UIDs (gh:111:gh:222 is ambiguous). Changed
   to '|' delimiter (gh:111|gh:222).
3. Search result peer extraction: split(':') on chatId could not
   recover UIDs containing ':'. Added extractPeerUid that handles
   both '|' and legacy ':' formats by prefix/suffix matching.
4. Rapid sends exhausted rooms: each handleSend opened a new room.
   Now reuses a single sendRoomRef with 5s idle close timer, same
   pattern as typingRoomRef.
5. GitHub "Add friend" never disabled: compared actionLoading
   (gh:123) with String(gh.id) (123). Fixed to use gh: prefix.
6. Mobile context menu flash: click handler on message bubble
   immediately dismissed the context menu opened by long-press.
   Removed the conflicting onClick; backdrop overlay handles dismiss.
7. Toast timeout stacking: rapid copy+delete caused first timeout
   to clear second toast early. Now clears previous timeout via ref
   before setting new one.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 6 bugs: URL regex, typing room leak, outbox race, clipboard, search nav, mobile delete

1. URL regex: global flag on shared regex caused stateful lastIndex,
   making every other URL in a message get missed. Replaced with
   fresh RegExp instance per parse call using exec() loop.
2. Typing indicator room leak: every keystroke opened a new WebSocket
   that could stay open forever if connection timing was unlucky. Now
   reuses a single room ref, closes after 5s idle, cleaned up on unmount.
3. Outbox retry race: setTimeout close fired async while loop opened
   next room, could exhaust 64-room cap. Now closes synchronously and
   awaits 200ms between retries.
4. Clipboard fallback: navigator.clipboard.writeText throws on HTTP
   and some mobile browsers. Added execCommand('copy') textarea fallback.
5. Search results navigate: clicking a search result now opens that
   chat via getOrCreateChat instead of being a dead-end display.
6. Mobile delete button: CSS :hover opacity trick was invisible on
   touch devices. Replaced with always-visible trash column + right-click
   context menu as alternative.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
Initial commit from standalone template

Fix 10 bugs found in quality audit

Undo/redo:
- Now saves and restores both cells AND formats (formatting
  changes are undoable)
- Redo stack properly tracks format state

Insert/delete/sort:
- Insert row/col now shifts formats along with cell values
- Delete row/col now shifts formats along with cell values
- Sort now moves formats with their rows
- Extracted shared shiftEntries helper to eliminate duplication

Replace all:
- Fixed regex test/replace bug where global regex lastIndex
  caused missed replacements

Keyboard:
- Removed bare ? key as help shortcut (was preventing typing ?
  in cells). Help is now Ctrl+/ only.

Popups:
- Color picker closes on Escape and outside click
- Context menu closes on Escape and outside click
- Both use stopPropagation to prevent immediate self-dismissal

Formula bar:
- No longer auto-starts editing on focus (was triggering edit
  mode when user just clicked the formula bar area)

Data model:
- setSheet callback no longer captures stale activeSheet index

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add sheet tabs, formatting toolbar, and keyboard shortcuts help

Multiple sheets:
- Tab bar at the bottom with Sheet 1, Sheet 2, etc.
- Click + to add new sheets
- Double-click tab to rename
- Right-click tab to delete
- Backward-compatible: migrates old single-sheet localStorage

Formatting toolbar:
- Bold (Ctrl+B) and Italic (Ctrl+I) toggles
- Text alignment: left / center / right
- Background color picker (17 colors + clear)
- Text color picker
- All formatting applies to selection range

Cell formatting:
- Per-cell bold, italic, alignment, bg color, text color
- Formats stored alongside cell data, persist in localStorage
- Visual feedback: active format buttons highlight in accent color

Keyboard shortcuts help:
- Press ? or Ctrl+/ to toggle the help panel
- Modal overlay with all shortcuts organized by category:
  Navigation, Editing, Formulas, Formatting, Tools

Data model refactored to WorkbookData with Sheet[] for
multi-sheet support. Automatic migration from old format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add context menu, find/replace, undo/redo, sort

Context menu (right-click any cell):
- Insert/delete row above/below
- Insert/delete column left/right
- Sort column A→Z or Z→A (handles numbers and text, empty rows to bottom)

Find & Replace:
- Ctrl+F opens find bar, Ctrl+H opens find+replace
- Highlights all matches (yellow) with current match brighter
- Enter/Shift+Enter to navigate between matches
- Replace one or replace all

Undo/Redo:
- Ctrl+Z undoes, Ctrl+Shift+Z / Ctrl+Y redoes
- Up to 50 undo levels, redo stack clears on new edit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
